home.heroTitle: Where you learn should not determine how much you learn.
home.heroSubtitle: Heartitude is a student-led service club in Panama. We provide English and math learning support, create our own materials, and research the environments where children learn — so every child has a fair chance to focus and grow.
home.bannerText: We go where learning is needed — with tutoring, materials, and the belief that every child deserves an equal start.
home.pathSubtitle: Two service tracks, one goal: equal learning for every child.
home.track1Sub: English online · Math in-person, every week

home.track2Sub: BioRhythm research — studying where children learn

1.desc: Observe the spaces where children study.

3.desc: Understand how the environment affects focus and anxiety.

home.valuesSubtitle: Heartitude — a blend of Heart and Attitude.

heart.title: Heart
heart.desc: We show up with warmth and genuine care for every child we support — not just as tutors, but as people who believe in them.

attitude.title: Attitude
attitude.desc: Real change comes from showing up consistently and solving problems with practical, low-cost approaches — week after week.

altitude.title: Altitude
altitude.desc: We aim to lift every student higher — raising the bar on what accessible learning can look like.

home.missionTileDesc: A student-led service club supporting learning and care.
home.involvedTileDesc: Volunteer with us or partner to bring packs to your community.

about.heroSubtitle: A student-led service club supporting learning and care.
about.missionText1: Heartitude — a blend of 'Heart' and 'Attitude.' A commitment to showing up with warmth, consistency, and purpose. That is what this name stands for.
about.missionText2: Education should not depend on where you learn. Heartitude is a student-led service club for preschool and elementary students who are falling behind — not because of their ability, but because of their circumstances: children in environments that need more support, children kept from school by illness, or children without the space and conditions to study. For those who are sick, we offer more than academic support — we offer warmth, companionship, and emotional encouragement.
about.missionText3a: We help in two ways. First, we create and share quality learning materials, and study math and English together — online or in person. Being present for a child is part of what we do.
about.missionText3b: Second, we study the environments where children learn. We measure how noise, lighting, temperature, and humidity affect learning — and find practical, low-cost improvements, with the goal of giving every child a better chance to focus.
about.whyText: We saw children with equal potential standing at very different starting lines. Some had no access to lessons at all — no tutoring, no materials, studying alone. Others had lessons, but learned in hospital waiting rooms, noisy care spaces, or environments where focus was nearly impossible. Heartitude was born from that observation: no child should fall behind simply because of the circumstances they were born into. We exist to close that gap.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Reaching every child, wherever they are.

consistency.title: Consistency
consistency.desc: Showing up, online or in person, steadily and reliably.

empathy.title: Empathy
empathy.desc: Understanding each child and meeting them where they are.

programs.heroSubtitle: We go where learning is needed.
programs.track1Materials: We create and provide our own learning materials and worksheets. Beyond academics, we show up with warmth and emotional encouragement.
programs.track1HealthDesc: A practical tool to help children track vaccinations, medications, and health routines.
programs.track2Premise: Reducing anxiety is the first condition for learning.
programs.track2Desc: We measure how noise, lighting, temperature, and humidity in hospitals and care spaces affect a child's sense of calm and ability to focus. We then research practical, low-cost improvements — such as lighting placement and quiet corner setup — to create better learning conditions.

resources.heroSubtitle: Free materials for students, families, and schools.

impact.heroSubtitle: Small actions. Real change. One child at a time.
impact.principlesIntro: Everything Heartitude does is rooted in values shared by educators and organizations around the world.

principles.quote: Every child deserves an equal opportunity to learn — regardless of where they are born or the circumstances they face.
principles.note: We exist to close the gap between potential and opportunity.

principles.quote: Opening the door to education is not enough. The conditions inside must also be right.
principles.note: We research the environments where children learn — and work to improve them.

principles.quote: No child should be left behind because of illness, poverty, or circumstance.
principles.note: We show up for children who have no other support — in person, online, and beyond.

activities.title: English Online Support
activities.desc: Launched weekday afternoon online English sessions for students at a local Panama City school.

activities.title: Math In-Person Visits
activities.desc: Started weekly Saturday in-person math tutoring visits to a local school.

activities.title: Learning Materials
activities.desc: Creating and distributing custom worksheets and study materials for math and English.

activities.title: BioRhythm Research
activities.desc: Preparing to measure and study learning environment factors — noise, lighting, temperature, and humidity.

getInvolved.heroSubtitle: Join us in making a difference. Whether you want to volunteer or partner with us, we need your help.
getInvolved.volunteerDesc: We're looking for passionate individuals to help with tutoring and content creation.
getInvolved.partnerDesc: Schools, NGOs, and care centers can request School Start Guide & Care-Space packs and implementation guides.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have a question or want to collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you! Your message has been sent.

footer.tagline: Connecting learning and care—where students need it most. Supporting learners in under-resourced schools and pediatric care settings.
